calendar.matters:
HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION
Off Calendar Feb-03-2020 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
ALan Sherwood, Esq. 510-409-6199 for Judgment Creditor.
No other Appearance

RULING - A R G U E D. Hearing is held. There is no Appearance by Judgment Debtor. (as fully reported in the reporter's notes/transcript) The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION ON BEHALF OF JUDGMENT DEBTOR BO. L. HUANG AKA BO LIAN HUANG.

Denied. The levying officer is directed to release $5289.93 to the Judgment Creditor for payment on the Judgment. Order is signed. (see scanned order for details)

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman, Clerk: M. Goodman, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR#8600, maria.torreano@gmail.com, Reported. =(302/EPS)
